flowSteps.intent: Friendly nudge — your AT&T Fiber order is saved and waiting.
Reinforce the $200 reward card plus symmetrical speeds, 99% reliability, and bundle savings.
Last chance — your $200 reward-card offer is expiring; complete your order today.

keyMessages: Finish your order online and get a $200 AT&T Visa Reward Card.
AT&T Fiber: equal upload & download speeds and 99% reliability.
Already an AT&T wireless customer? Bundle Fiber and save on your internet bill.
You're almost done — your plan and address are saved; pick up where you left off.
mandatoryDisclaimers: $200 AT&T Visa Reward Card: requires online order and installation of a qualifying AT&T Fiber plan. Reward card delivered within 8 weeks after installation; card issued by a bank under license and subject to cardholder terms. Limited availability in select areas.
Prices exclude taxes & fees and are subject to change. Speeds may vary. 99% reliability based on network availability; not a guarantee of uninterrupted service.
offer: $200 AT&T Visa Reward Card when you complete your AT&T Fiber order online.
summary: Recover prospects who began an AT&T Fiber order online and dropped off before completing. Bring them back with the $200 reward-card incentive, reinforced by Fiber's equal upload/download speeds and 99% reliability. Existing AT&T wireless customers also save by bundling. A three-step email + SMS sequence that nudges, reinforces value, then creates urgency before the offer lapses.
title: AT&T Fiber Order Recovery

keyMessages: Up to $1,100 off iPhone 17 Pro / Pro Max with eligible trade-in; up to $700 off iPhone Air / 17.
Credits apply over 36 months on a qualifying AT&T unlimited plan (Premium 2.0, Elite 2.0, or qualifying legacy plans).
Trade-in is easy and contactless — check your device value online, keep your number, switch in minutes.
mandatoryDisclaimers: Req's purchase of an eligible device on a qualifying installment plan and activation on a qualifying AT&T unlimited plan (AT&T Premium 2.0 or higher). Well-qualified customers. Trade-in device must be in good condition and valued at $290+ after assessment. Up to $1,100 applied as bill credits over 36 mos; credits start within 3 bills. If service is cancelled, remaining device balance is due. Limited-time offer; subject to change.
AT&T 5G requires a compatible plan and device. 5G not available everywhere. Coverage and speeds may vary.
offer: Up to $1,100 off iPhone 17 Pro or Pro Max with eligible trade-in on AT&T Premium 2.0 (or higher) — applied as bill credits over 36 months.
summary: Drive upgrades and new-line activations around AT&T's headline trade-in offer. Trade in an eligible smartphone (valued $290+ after assessment) and get up to $1,100 off iPhone 17 Pro or Pro Max as bill credits over 36 months on AT&T Premium 2.0 or higher. Position the iPhone 17 Pro's camera and Apple-silicon performance alongside AT&T's nationwide 5G. One coordinated send across web, email, and SMS, tuned per audience segment.
title: iPhone 17 Pro Trade-In Event

children.text: Equip your teams with the performance, security, and reliability they need when every second counts. Upgrade to iPhone 17 Pro or Pro Max on FirstNet®, Built with AT&T and get up to $1,100 off with eligible trade-in — plus up to $700 off iPhone Air / 17 — on a qualifying AT&T unlimited plan (Premium 2.0, Elite 2.0, or qualifying legacy plans).

on a qualifying AT&T unlimited plan (Premium 2.0, Elite 2.0, or qualifying legacy plans).

— check your device value online, keep your number, switch in minutes.
Backed by AT&T nationwide 5G coverage
to help keep your teams connected on scene, in the field, and in transit.

Put the advanced camera system, Apple silicon performance, and long battery life of {{product.name}} to work across your organization — from incident response and dispatch to field inspections and secure collaboration.
Why FirstNet for your agency or business
FirstNet is purpose-built for public safety and the extended community that supports it, with features designed for operational continuity:
Dedicated, physically separate core for FirstNet traffic
Priority and preemption for eligible first responders
Robust security and reliability backed by AT&T
Pair that with iPhone 17 Pro or Pro Max and AT&T 5G to help your teams share data, video, and critical updates when it matters most.

and confirm eligibility.

(AT&T Premium 2.0, Elite 2.0, or qualifying legacy plans).

with our easy, contactless process.

toward your new {{product.name}}.
